motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions, minimal feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button, dark fill with light text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #201d1d; color: #fdfcfc; padding: 4px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Berkeley Mono', monospace; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #302c2c; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #007aff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Text Field
components.description: Form input with generous padding for typing comfort.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #f8f7f7; color: #201d1d; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(15, 0, 0, 0.12); border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Berkeley Mono', monospace; font-size: 16px; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #007aff; outline: none; }

components.name: Link
components.description: Underlined link, weight 500, accent on hover.
components.css: .ds-link { color: #201d1d; text-decoration: underline; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Berkeley Mono', monospace; transition: color 0.1s; } .ds-link:hover { color: #007aff; }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Flat container with warm border, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #302c2c; border: 1px solid rgba(15, 0, 0, 0.12); border-radius: 4px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'Berkeley Mono', monospace; } .ds-card-header { font-weight: 700; color: #fdfcfc; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-weight: 400; color: #9a9898; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Horizontal nav with underline links, solid dark background.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; background: #201d1d; padding: 16px 24px; font-family: 'Berkeley Mono', monospace; } .ds-nav-brand { font-weight: 700; color: #fdfcfc; } .ds-nav-link { color: #fdfcfc; text-decoration: underline; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #007aff; }

narrative.overview: Analogous to a profiler or debugger: function-first, no marketing decoration, trustworthy accuracy. The visual system is built on warm minimalism: a near-black background with subtle reddish-brown warmth, paired with soft off-white text. Berkeley Mono is the sole typeface, creating a unified 'everything is code' philosophy where hierarchy is achieved through weight and scale alone. Flat by design. Depth is conveyed through border treatments and background color shifts, never shadows.
keyCharacteristics: Berkeley Mono as the sole typeface
Warm near-black primary with reddish-brown undertone

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The color palette is deliberately restrained. Primary and neutral tones carry 90%+ of the surface. Accent and semantic colors appear only where they signal meaning, not decoration.

rules.name: The Weight Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: 700 for headings, 500 for interactive emphasis, 400 for body. Three weight levels create the entire hierarchy. Never introduce a second font family.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No elevation illusion, no ambient shadows. Hover and focus use opacity or border shifts, not lift.

dos: Do use Warm Ink (#201d1d) for backgrounds, never pure black (#000000)
Do use Soft Cream (#fdfcfc) for text on dark, never pure white (#ffffff)
Do keep surfaces flat: borders and background shifts only
Do cap body line length at 65-75ch
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient)
Don't apply glassmorphism, blur effects decoratively
Don't introduce sans-serif or serif typefaces
Don't use shadows for elevation or hover states
Don't present raw data dumps without hierarchy
